mapper.sql: id, person_id, person_name, person_id_card, department, position, analysis_type, analysis_content, analysis_result, risk_level, risk_score, suggestions, ai_model, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, total_tokens, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO monitor_records ( person_id, person_name, person_id_card, department, position, analysis_type, analysis_content, analysis_result, risk_level, risk_score, suggestions, ai_model, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, total_tokens, create_time, create_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{personId}, #{personName}, #{personIdCard}, #{department}, #{position}, #{analysisType}, #{analysisContent}, #{analysisResult}, #{riskLevel}, #{riskScore}, #{suggestions}, #{aiModel}, #{promptTokens}, #{completionTokens}, #{totalTokens}, #{createTime}, #{createBy}, 0 )

INSERT INTO monitor_records ( person_id, person_name, person_id_card, department, position, analysis_type, analysis_content, analysis_result, risk_level, risk_score, suggestions, ai_model, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, total_tokens, create_time, create_by, deleted ) VALUES
( #{item.personId}, #{item.personName}, #{item.personIdCard}, #{item.department}, #{item.position}, #{item.analysisType}, #{item.analysisContent}, #{item.analysisResult}, #{item.riskLevel}, #{item.riskScore}, #{item.suggestions}, #{item.aiModel}, #{item.promptTokens}, #{item.completionTokens}, #{item.totalTokens}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.createBy}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM monitor_records WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM monitor_records WHERE person_id = #{personId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM monitor_records WHERE risk_level = #{riskLevel} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM monitor_records WHERE department = #{department} AND risk_level = 'HIGH' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY risk_score DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM monitor_records WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND deleted = 0
SELECT risk_level as riskLevel, COUNT(*) as count FROM monitor_records WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY risk_level
SELECT FROM monitor_records WHERE risk_level = 'HIGH' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT FROM monitor_records WHERE person_id = #{personId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
